The '''''Sea Legacy''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] that deployed the clone forces in the [[Battle of Pengalan IV]]. When the battle turned out to be an ambush, the ''Sea Legacy'' recovered her troops, and retreated immediately.

{{Ship-stub}}
